Select the support magic that you wish to cast. The amount of magic that can be cast is limited by the Manager's MP.
The Manager's MP is currently %mp%.

Wind Walk Lv.2 Decrease Weight Lv.3 Shield Lv.3 Mental Shield Lv.4 Might Lv.3
Bless The Body Lv.2 Magic Barrier Lv.1 Resist Shock Lv.1 Bless the Soul Lv.2
